name: tenacious-bench
license_rationale: Permissive reuse for derivative bench work; attribution to Tenacious style guide and Atnabon (TRP1 Week 11). See methodology.md#license.

held_out.release_policy: Tasks remain sealed until the leaderboard is published in Act V. The unsealed JSONL is gitignored and stored encrypted; SHA256 of the unsealed file is committed.

model_routes_used: deepseek/deepseek-v3.2 (dev-tier bulk variants alternate, preference-leakage-prevention pair to qwen)
interim_note: v0.1.0-interim ships 44 hand-curated representative tasks (12 trace-derived, 13 programmatic, 11 multi-LLM, 8 hand-authored-adversarial) covering all 11 dimensions. v0.1.0 final will scale to 240 via the pipeline at generation_scripts/.
